headline: Is It Time To Reassess Disney (DIS) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: For investors wondering whether Walt Disney shares are attractively priced or still carrying a premium, this article breaks down what the current price might imply about value. The stock last closed at US$99.51, with returns of 0.2% over 7 days, a 7.1% decline over 30 days, an 11.0% decline year to date, a 1.2% gain over 1 year, an 8.3% gain over 3 years and a 45.2% decline over 5 years. Taken together, these figures present a mixed picture for anyone thinking about timing. Recent headlines...

headline: Disney Sank Millions Into the New ‘Bachelorette.’ Then It Pulled the Plug.
summary: “Secret Lives of Mormon Wives” star Taylor Frankie Paul was picked to boost an aging reality franchise beset by sagging ratings and declining ad revenue—a decision that blew up in ABC’s face.
